lnf_analysis.issue: Focus enters on the header logo/home link.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This entry point is reasonable because it starts at the beginning of the page's global header and matches a common top-left starting point.
lnf_analysis.impact: Keyboard users begin at a predictable location.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: Starting on the logo/home link is a logical first focus target.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus jumps from the leftmost logo to the far-right 'Download Firefox' button before visiting the header navigation links located visually between them.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: Using a top-to-bottom, left-to-right reading model, users would expect the next focus after the logo to move to the adjacent navigation links, not skip across the entire header to a later control.
lnf_analysis.impact: This creates a disorienting header sequence and can make users think items 3-6 were skipped or located elsewhere.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: The jump from the left logo to the far-right button breaks the expected left-to-right order of the header.

lnf_analysis.issue: After reaching the far-right header button, focus returns back leftward to the first navigation link.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This reverses the visual scan direction within the same row and produces a zig-zag pattern instead of a meaningful linear order.
lnf_analysis.impact: Keyboard users must mentally reorient to a previous visual area, reducing predictability and increasing navigation effort.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: Moving from the rightmost header button back to links on its left is not a logical sequential focus order.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves from 'Firefox Browsers' to 'Products'.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This follows the visible left-to-right order of adjacent navigation items.
lnf_analysis.impact: Keyboard users can continue through the header nav predictably.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a logical left-to-right header navigation step.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves from 'Products' to 'Who We Are'.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This matches the visual order of the navigation menu.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: The transition follows expected adjacent navigation order.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves from 'Who We Are' to 'Innovation'.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This remains consistent with the left-to-right order of the remaining top navigation links.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This transition is visually and semantically consistent.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves from the header into the main article content.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: Although intermediate non-focusable headings and text appear visually first, the next focusable element being an inline link within the main content is still a meaningful progression into the page body.
lnf_analysis.impact: Keyboard users arrive at the first interactive element within the primary content area.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: Moving from global navigation to the first focusable link in the main content is acceptable.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves between two inline links in the main article.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: These links appear in reading order as the user moves downward through the article.
lnf_analysis.impact: The article's interactive content is navigated in a sensible sequence.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This follows the main content's reading flow.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves from article content to the contact section's first link.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This follows the page's downward reading order into the next section.
lnf_analysis.impact: Users progress naturally through the article toward contact information.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a logical continuation into the next section.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves within the 'Contact Mozilla' section from the email link to the data request link.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This aligns with the paragraph order in the section.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: The transition follows local reading order within the section.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the forums link later in the contact section.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This continues the top-to-bottom reading order within the section.
lnf_analysis.impact: The user can consume the contact content sequentially.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a normal progression through the contact links.

lnf_analysis.issue: After the end of the main article/contact content, focus jumps back upward to the left sidebar navigation near the top of the page.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: A sighted user reading top-to-bottom would expect focus to continue downward into the footer or nearby lower-page controls, not return to a much earlier side navigation area that was visually present far above.
lnf_analysis.impact: This creates a substantial spatial and contextual jump, making the page feel out of sequence and increasing cognitive load.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: Focus returns to an earlier sidebar region instead of continuing downward from the end of the main content.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves down the left sidebar list.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: The links are traversed in visible top-to-bottom order.
lnf_analysis.impact: Sidebar navigation itself is internally coherent.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a logical sidebar list sequence.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the next sidebar link.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This matches the visual order of the list.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: The list order is preserved.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus continues through the sidebar list.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: The order is top-to-bottom and predictable.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This follows the displayed order.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus continues through the sidebar list.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: The order remains visually sequential.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is consistent list navigation.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus continues through the sidebar list.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: The transition follows visible order.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This remains a predictable sequence.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus continues through the sidebar list.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: The order is sequential.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This transition is logical.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus continues through the sidebar list.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: The order mirrors the visible presentation.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: The sidebar remains internally consistent.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus continues through the sidebar list.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This is visually sequential.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: The transition follows top-to-bottom order.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus continues through the sidebar list.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: The order remains predictable.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This list transition is logical.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus continues through the sidebar list.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: The order matches the visible list sequence.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a normal adjacent-item transition.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus continues through the sidebar list.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: The order is top-to-bottom.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This continues the visible list order.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the last visible link in the sidebar list.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This aligns with the sidebar's visual order.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: The sidebar list remains coherent.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves from the end of the sidebar list to the next focusable card link lower in the left column.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This follows the left column's downward progression.
lnf_analysis.impact: Keyboard users can continue through the left column naturally.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This transition stays within the same column and moves downward.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the second link in the same 'Data Privacy Principles' card.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This is consistent with reading order inside the card.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: The card's internal link order is logical.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the next card below, 'Transparency Report'.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This reflects the top-to-bottom order in the left column.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a sensible move to the next item below.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves into the 'Get Involved' card below.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This matches the left column reading order.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: The sequence continues downward as expected.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the second link in the 'Get Involved' card.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This follows the local text/link order inside the card.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This transition is internally consistent.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the standalone 'Outdated Policies' link below.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This continues down the same left column.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: The left-column sequence remains logical.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves from the left-column content area to the footer, beginning with the first link in the Company column.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This is a reasonable continuation downward into the footer's first column.
lnf_analysis.impact: Users proceed from page body to footer in a predictable way.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: Entering the footer at its first column is acceptable.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves down the Company footer column.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This follows the visible top-to-bottom order.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a normal vertical list sequence.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus continues down the Company footer column.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: The order matches the displayed list.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: The footer column is navigated logically.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus continues down the Company footer column.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This preserves visible order.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This remains consistent with the layout.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus continues down the Company footer column.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This is top-to-bottom within the column.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a logical adjacent transition.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus reaches the final link in the Company footer column.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: The sequence remains internally coherent.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This properly completes the Company column.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves from the bottom of the Company column to the top of the Resources column.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: Under a row/column reading model for grouped footer columns, finishing one column then moving to the next column's top is still a meaningful order.
lnf_analysis.impact: Keyboard users can continue through footer groups systematically.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: Moving from one completed footer column to the next is acceptable.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves down the Resources column.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This follows top-to-bottom order.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a logical list progression.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the next Resources link.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This matches visible order.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This transition is consistent.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves from the Resources column to the Support column.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This is a reasonable progression across footer columns after completing the previous group.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is an acceptable grouped-footer transition.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves down the Support column.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This follows visible top-to-bottom order.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a logical within-column step.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves from the Support column to the Developers column.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This follows the footer's grouped layout from left to right after finishing the previous column.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a reasonable next-column transition.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves down the Developers column.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: The order is sequential within the column.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This follows the displayed list order.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus continues down the Developers column.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This remains top-to-bottom.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a consistent list transition.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus continues down the Developers column.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This matches the visual order.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: The sequence remains logical.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus continues down the Developers column.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: The progression is visually sequential.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is expected within-column navigation.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus continues down the Developers column.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This aligns with the visible list order.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: The transition is logical.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the last visible link in the Developers column.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This completes the column in top-to-bottom order.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This properly completes the Developers column.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves from the Developers column to the social links area on the right.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This continues across the footer from left toward right, consistent with the overall layout.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a reasonable continuation to the next footer group.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves between the two @Mozilla social icons.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: These adjacent controls are traversed together in local order.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a logical within-group transition.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the first @Firefox social icon below.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This follows the social groups from top to bottom.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: The social section is navigated sensibly.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the next @Firefox social icon.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This is an adjacent control in the same group.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This group order is logical.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the third @Firefox social icon.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This completes the visible group in order.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a consistent local sequence.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the language-related control area lower in the footer.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This continues downward within the right footer area.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a reasonable move to the next control group.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves from the language label/link to the language selector.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: These are directly associated controls in the same area.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a logical pairing of related controls.

lnf_analysis.issue: After the lower-right language selector, focus jumps leftward to the footer logo before other lower-row footer links are completed in left-to-right order.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: In the lower footer row, a reading model would typically move from the leftmost logo toward the adjacent legal links, or if starting at the right language area, would not then jump back to the far-left beginning of the row without an evident reason.
lnf_analysis.impact: This creates another spatially disorienting reversal in the footer and makes the lower footer row harder to understand as a linear sequence.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: The jump from the lower-right language selector to the far-left footer logo disrupts expected row order.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves from the footer logo to the first legal link.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: Once at the left start of the lower footer row, the sequence proceeds left to right.
lnf_analysis.impact: No issue within this local row.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This follows the lower footer row's visible order.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the next legal link.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This is adjacent left-to-right order.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a logical footer link transition.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the next legal link.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This remains consistent with visible order.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This transition is predictable.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the next legal/community link.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This follows the row sequence.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a normal adjacent step.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the first link in the copyright/foundation sentence below.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This continues downward to the next line of footer content.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a reasonable move into the final footer text links.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the second link in the same footer sentence.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This matches reading order in the sentence.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This follows the sentence's inline link order.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus moves to the Creative Commons license link.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: This is the next focusable item in the footer text block.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: This is a logical final link in the footer content.

lnf_analysis.issue: Focus exits the page after the last footer link.
lnf_analysis.why_it_fails: Ending after the final focusable element is expected behavior.
lnf_analysis.impact: Keyboard users can leave the page naturally once all interactive content has been traversed.
lnf_analysis.one_sentence_reason: The exit transition occurs at the end of the page's focus order.
